full_range.description: Standard V1 AMM — full-range liquidity across the entire price curve
full_range.best_for: set-and-forget, fees auto-compound into LP token value

lb_v2_future.note: No LB V2.1 pairs exist for UNY yet. LB interfaces kept in contracts/interfaces/ for future use.

notes: V1 AMM: fees auto-compound into LP token — no separate collectFees needed.
Both UNY pairs confirmed V1 classic via diagnosePair.ts + diagnoseLB.ts (2026-06-20).
LB V2.1 factory has 2072 total pairs but ZERO for UNY.
All operations default to DRY_RUN=true for safety.
LP_GLOBAL_DISABLE=true blocks ALL tx execution (kill switch).
Safety thresholds enforced: max wallet %, max USD, slippage ceiling.
require_dry_run_first: must DRY_RUN=true within 1hr before live execution.
